verses.text: “Ka neu lai-a kipanin nakpi takin amaute in kei hong gimsak uh hi,” Israel in tu-in ci ta hen
“Ka neu lai-a kipanin nakpi takin amaute in kei hong gimsak uh a, ahih hangin amaute in kei hong zo nailo uh hi
Lo khote in lei a kuih bangin ka nungzang hong kuikek uh a, tu-ma-kuakte tawh kibangsak uh hi
Topa thuman a, amah in migilote' henna khaute sutat khinta hi,” amaute in ci ta uh hen
Zion a mudahte khempeuh maizumin kinungkiksak ta hen

Amaute pen a khan' khit ma-a a vul, innkhumzanga lopa, an atpa in a khutsungah a kaihkhop loh, buhlom henpa in a ang-ah a pomloh, amau a mukhate in, “ Topa' thupha na tungah om ta hen. Topa' min tawh thupha kong pia uh hi,” a cihloh mite tawh kibangsak in.
